creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
The World’s Most Fancy McDonald’s

The McMansion📍McDonald’s in New Hyde Park, Long Island NY

McDonald’s purchased a 1700s Mansion that was owned by the Denton Family and the local neighborhood forced them to preserve it which is why it hasn’t been modernized on the outside making this one of the most fancy McDonald’s in the world

#NewYork #nyc #McDonalds #travel #visitNewYork

geo_locations: McDonald’s in New Hyde Park, Long Island NY
pinned_places: McDonald’s in New Hyde Park, Long Island NY

transcription.text: I just made it to the world's most fancy McDonald's. That's right, there's a fancy McDonald's called the McMansion, which is located on Long Island, New York, just a quick train ride from Manhattan. It's known to be the classiest McDonald's in America, and that's because it was placed inside of a real historic mansion from the 1700s. The inside has a grand staircase with two floors, ceiling rafters, fancy lights, and nice places to sit while enjoying your meal. There's even a sunroom. The menu is pretty standard, but I'll say, the food tastes just a bit better than your average McDonald's in this environment. Even the sign is kind of fancy here. 4.2 stars might be the best rating I've seen on a McDonald's yet.
